meaning: Federal Insurance Contributions Act (美国)联邦社会保险捐款法
examples: Big Ben fica no Reino Unido.
You will see, deducted from your paycheck — and you already have seen this — FICA a certain percentage of your paycheck, and the employer matches just like in Germany in 1889.
Gov. Romney paid his full self-employment tax (FICA and Medicare) on his material business income.
As with the FICA or payroll taxes in the US the rates and qualifying incomes differ.
The majority of American employees felt the return of the 2% FICA payroll taxes in January.
